behaviors.description: Storing a PASS review summary is blocked when any stored dimension finding for the same round has a FAIL verdict.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is policy enforcement across summary-write logic and findings storage lookup (module handoff), not a single pure function. No real OS/network/subprocess is required, and correctness depends on stored verdict fields, not LLM output quality. Rejected higher levels: behavior text is about "stored dimension finding ... has a FAIL verdict," which disqualifies System/Agentic/Workflow as minimum.
behaviors.test_description: Wire review-summary service to a real in-process findings repository (test DB or equivalent). Seed one round with at least one FAIL dimension finding, attempt to store PASS summary, assert write is rejected and error references conflicting stored finding.

behaviors.description: Stop-gate verdict computation reads per-dimension stored findings directly and does not rely only on hand-written summary text.
behaviors.justification: This targets data-source selection across gate logic + persistence layer, a multi-module interaction. In-process wiring is enough to catch the real regression (trusting summary text). No real infra needed; no model judgment needed. Rejected higher levels: behavior explicitly says "reads per-dimension stored findings directly," so System/Agentic/Workflow are not required.
behaviors.test_description: Seed storage with per-dimension findings containing FAIL while summary text says all PASS. Run stop-gate verdict computation through real service+repo wiring and assert final verdict is non-PASS based on stored findings.

behaviors.description: Manual summary text overrides require an explicit override flag and produce an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: Behavior spans request validation, summary persistence, and audit record emission/storage. That interaction is beyond one local function but still reproducible fully in-process. No real OS/network/subprocess dependence; no LLM-output dependence. Rejected higher levels: behavior text is about "explicit override flag" and "auditable warning record," not real external infra or model decisions.
behaviors.test_description: Execute summary-save flow without override flag and assert manual override is denied. Re-run with override flag and assert summary is accepted plus a warning audit record is persisted with actor/round/reason fields.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, the review loop cannot finalize PASS unless a fresh review-agent round is executed on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: Core failure is orchestration/state-handoff: fix-phase completion must invalidate prior review round and require a new round artifact tied to updated diff. This is cross-module state logic, testable with deterministic round metadata; LLM content quality is not under test. Rejected higher levels: behavior requires that a "fresh review-agent round is executed on the updated diff," but does not require validating model judgment from that round, so Agentic/Workflow are not minimum.
behaviors.test_description: Create state with previous review round PASSable, then apply Phase 4 fix producing a new diff fingerprint. Attempt finalize without new review round and assert blocked. Add a new review round linked to updated diff and assert finalize can proceed (subject to findings).

behaviors.description: If review rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings, the flow emits an escalation outcome instead of PASS.
behaviors.justification: This is loop-state + findings-resolution policy across coordinator and findings store. Real failure appears at module interaction (round counter + unresolved finding status). No OS/network/subprocess requirement. Agentic not minimum because behavior depends on persisted MUST-FIX status, not fresh model quality. Rejected higher levels: text is "rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings," which is deterministic orchestration state, so System/Agentic/Workflow are not required as minimum.
behaviors.test_description: Seed workflow state at max rounds with unresolved MUST-FIX findings. Run finalize/termination step and assert outcome is ESCALATION (or equivalent) and explicitly not PASS.
